kikuyu: ũmeere atĩrĩ, ‘Mwathani Jehova ekuuga ũũ: Kaĩ andũ-a-nja arĩa matumagĩrĩra ithitũ nyunĩro-inĩ ciao cia moko na magathondekaga mataama ma kwĩhumbĩra ũthiũ nĩguo magwatagie andũ marĩ na haaro-ĩ. Anga mũrĩgwatagia mĩoyo
english: “Son of man, eat your bread with quaking, and drink your water with trembling and with fearfulness.

kikuyu: Andũ acio nĩ ithima itarĩ maaĩ, na nĩ ibii iria itwaragwo nĩ kĩhuhũkanio. Nao no nduma nene makĩria metereirio.
english: If you call on him as Father, who without respect of persons judges according to each man’s work, pass the time of your living as foreigners here in reverent fear,

kikuyu: Nĩwarekeire andũ aku waganu wao, na ũkĩhumbĩra mehia mao mothe.
english: Preserve my soul, for I am godly. You, my God, save your servant who trusts in you.

kikuyu: Mũrũ wa Ithe witũ kana mwarĩ wa Ithe witũ angĩkorwo ndarĩ na nguo cia kwĩhumba, kana irio cia kũrĩa o mũthenya,
english: And if a brother or sister is naked and in lack of daily food,

kikuyu: Atĩrĩrĩ, ũngĩgerekania Mũrungu na ũ? Kana nĩ mũhianĩre ũrĩkũ mũngĩmũgerekania naguo?
english: Servants, be in subjection to your masters with all respect, not only to the good and gentle, but also to the wicked.

kikuyu: “No mũtamaiyũ ũcio ũgĩcookia atĩrĩ, ‘No ndigane na maguta makwa marĩa matũmaga ngai o na andũ matĩĩo, ngariũnge ũũ na ũũ igũrũ rĩa mĩtĩ ĩrĩa ĩngĩ?’
english: 1 Abimelech the son of Jerubbaal went to Shechem to his mother’s brothers, and spoke with them and with all the family of the house of his mother’s father, saying,

kikuyu: Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma, mũndũ ũrĩa wĩtĩkĩtie arĩ na muoyo wa tene na tene.
english: Most certainly, I tell you, he who believes in me has eternal life.

kikuyu: Etagĩrĩra Jehova na ũrũmagĩrĩre njĩra yake. Nĩagagũtũũgĩria nĩguo ũgae bũrũri; rĩrĩa andũ arĩa aaganu makaaniinwo-rĩ, wee nĩũkeyonera ũndũ ũcio.
english: Wait for Yahweh, and keep his way, and he will exalt you to inherit the land. When the wicked are cut off, you shall see it.

kikuyu: Mũndũ ũrĩa uugaga atĩ arĩ ũtheri-inĩ no nĩathũire mũrũ kana mwarĩ wa ithe-rĩ, ũcio arĩ o nduma- inĩ.
english: He who says he is in the light and hates his brother is in the darkness even until now.

kikuyu: Tega matũ, na ũthikĩrĩrie mĩario ya andũ arĩa oogĩ; nyiita na ngoro yaku maũndũ marĩa ngũrutana,
english: Turn your ear, and listen to the words of the wise. Apply your heart to my teaching.

kikuyu: “Rĩu niĩ nĩngũthondeka kĩrĩkanĩro gĩakwa na inyuĩ, na njiaro cianyu iria igooka thuutha wanyu,
english: “As for me, behold, I establish my covenant with you, and with your offspring after you,

kikuyu: O hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ akĩĩra arutwo ake matoonye gatarũ, mathiĩ mbere yake mũrĩmo ũrĩa ũngĩ wa iria mũira wa oigĩre kĩrĩndĩ ũhoro.
english: Immediately Jesus made the disciples get into the boat and go ahead of him to the other side, while he sent the multitudes away.

kikuyu: Thuutha waruo gũũkaga mũgambo wa mũraramo wake; arurumaga na mũgambo wake mũkaru. Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũgambo wake waiguuo-rĩ, ndarigagĩrĩria heni.
english: After it a voice roars. He thunders with the voice of his majesty. He doesn’t hold back anything when his voice is heard.

kikuyu: Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe ekuuga atĩrĩ, ‘Betha nĩ yakwa, o na thahabu nĩ yakwa.
english: The silver is mine, and the gold is mine,’ says Yahweh of Armies.

kikuyu: Mĩhũmũ yake nĩ ta rũũĩ rũratherera na hinya rũkambata rũgakinya o nginya ngingo. Athũngũthagia ndũrĩrĩ gĩcungi-inĩ kĩa mwanangĩko; ekagĩra andũ matamu kanua nĩgeetha amahĩtithie. Na inyuĩ nĩmũkaina, ta ũrĩa mũinaga ũtukũ ũrĩa mũkũngũyagĩra gĩathĩ kĩrĩa kĩamũre; nacio ngoro cianyu nĩigakena ta ũrĩa andũ makenaga makĩambata kĩrĩma kĩa Jehova makĩhuhaga mĩtũrirũ, o ũcio Rwaro-rwa-Ihiga rwa Isiraeli.
english: His breath is as an overflowing stream that reaches even to the neck, to sift the nations with the sieve of destruction. A bridle that leads to ruin will be in the jaws of the peoples.

kikuyu: na kuuma njiaro cia Zatu, aarĩ Shekania mũrũ wa Jahazieli, hamwe na andũ angĩ 300;
english: let the priests take it to them, each man from his donor; and they shall repair the damage to the house, wherever any damage is found.”

kikuyu: Tondũ Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ, ‘Matukũ nĩmarooka, rĩrĩa ngaarehe andũ akwa a Isiraeli na a Juda moime kũrĩa maatwarirwo maatahwo na ndĩmacookie bũrũri ũrĩa ndaheire maithe mao mawĩgwatĩre,’ ũguo nĩguo Jehova ekuuga.”
english: For, behold, the days come,’ says Yahweh, ‘that I will reverse the captivity of my people Israel and Judah,’ says Yahweh. ‘I will cause them to return to the land that I gave to their fathers, and they will possess it.’ ”

kikuyu: nĩgũkorwo acio eerĩ no mamũrehithĩrie mwanangĩko wa narua, na nũũ ũngĩmenya nĩ mĩtino ĩrĩkũ mangĩrehe? Mĩario ĩngĩ ya arĩa Oogĩ
english: for their calamity will rise suddenly. Who knows what destruction may come from them both?

kikuyu: “Na niĩ ngĩũria atĩrĩ, ‘Wee nĩ we ũ, Mwathani?’ “Nake akĩnjookeria atĩrĩ, ‘Nĩ niĩ Jesũ wa Nazarethi, ũrĩa ũranyariira.’ Nao andũ arĩa twarĩ nao nĩmoonire ũtheri ũcio, no matiataũkĩirwo nĩ mũgambo wa ũcio wanjaragĩria.
english: I answered, ‘Who are you, Lord?’ He said to me, ‘I am Jesus of Nazareth, whom you persecute.’

kikuyu: Kũrigania nake, Binui mũrũ wa Henadadi nĩacookereirie gĩcunjĩ kĩngĩ kuuma nyũmba-inĩ ya Azaria o nginya koine-inĩ harĩa thingo ciacemanĩirie,
english: After him, Binnui the son of Henadad repaired another portion, from the house of Azariah to the turning of the wall, and to the corner.

kikuyu: Ũcooke ũcioe ũcitwarĩre thoguo arĩe nĩgeetha akũrathime na kĩrathimo gĩake atanakua.” No Jakubu akĩĩra nyina Rebeka atĩrĩ, “Esaũ mũrũ wa maitũ nĩ wa mwĩrĩ ũrĩ guoya, na mwĩrĩ wakwa ndũrĩ guoya.
english: Abimelech said, “What is this you have done to us? One of the people might easily have lain with your wife, and you would have brought guilt on us!”

kikuyu: Andũ arĩa othe aamũre nĩmamũgeithia.
english: Greet Rufus, the chosen in the Lord, and his mother and mine.

kikuyu: Mũndũ ũrĩa ũthiiaga na mĩthiĩre mĩrũngĩrĩru nĩwe mwĩtigĩri Jehova,
english: He who walks in his uprightness fears Yahweh, but he who is perverse in his ways despises him.

kikuyu: “Ariũ a Ithe witũ, o inyuĩ ciana cia Iburahĩmu, o na inyuĩ andũ-a-Ndũrĩrĩ arĩa mwĩtigĩrĩte Ngai, ũhoro ũyũ wa ũhonokio nĩ ithuĩ tũtũmĩirwo.
english: “Brothers, children of the stock of Abraham, and those among you who fear God, the word of this salvation is sent out to you.

kikuyu: Agĩcooka agĩĩta arutwo arĩa ikũmi na eerĩ, akĩmatũma mathiĩ eerĩ eerĩ na akĩmahe ũhoti wa kũingata ngoma thũku. Na akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Mũtigekuuĩre kĩndũ o nakĩ rũgendo-inĩ tiga o mũtirima; na mũtigakuue mũgate, kana mondo, kana mbeeca ibeeti-inĩ cianyu.
english: He called to himself the twelve, and began to send them out two by two; and he gave them authority over the unclean spirits.

kikuyu: Ũndũ ũcio nĩũkoneka ta ũtarĩ wa ma kũrĩ andũ arĩa mehĩtĩte atĩ nĩmarĩmwathĩkagĩra, nowe nĩakamaririkania mahĩtia mao, acooke amanyiite mĩgwate.
english: It will be to them as a false divination in their sight, who have sworn oaths to them; but he brings iniquity to memory, that they may be taken.

kikuyu: “ ‘Niĩ Jehova nĩnjarĩtie. Ihinda nĩikinyu njĩke ũndũ. Ndikerigĩrĩria; na ndikaiguanĩra tha kana ndĩĩricũkwo. Ũgaatuĩrwo ciira kũringana na mĩtugo yaku, na ciĩko ciaku, ũguo nĩguo Mwathani Jehova ekuuga.’ ” Mũtumia wa Ezekieli Gũkua
english: I will lay my vengeance on Edom by the hand of my people Israel. They will do in Edom according to my anger and according to my wrath. Then they will know my vengeance,” says the Lord Yahweh.

kikuyu: Marĩkũngũyagĩra gĩathĩ kĩu hwaĩ-inĩ wa mũthenya wa ikũmi na ĩna wa mweri wa keerĩ. Marĩrĩĩaga gatũrũme na mĩgate ĩtarĩ mĩĩkĩre ndawa ya kũimbia na nyeni ndũrũ.
english: and Aaron shall offer the Levites before Yahweh for a wave offering on the behalf of the children of Israel, that it may be theirs to do the service of Yahweh.

kikuyu: tigai kũrongooria Betheli, tigai gũthiĩ Giligali, na mũtikanyiite rũgendo rwa gũthiĩ Birishiba. Tondũ andũ a Giligali ti-itherũ nĩmagatahwo, na andũ a Betheli matuuo kĩndũ hatarĩ.”
english: but don’t seek Bethel, nor enter into Gilgal, and don’t pass to Beersheba; for Gilgal shall surely go into captivity, and Bethel shall come to nothing.

kikuyu: Wahota kuumagaragia njata iria ciĩtagwo Mazarothu o mahinda maacio maakinya, kana wahota gũtongoria Nduba na ciana ciayo?
english: Can you lead the constellations out in their season? Or can you guide the Bear with her cubs?

kikuyu: Nawe njookeria, akorwo nĩũkũhota;
english: If you can, answer me. Set your words in order before me, and stand up.

kikuyu: O ro rĩmwe andũ a Benjamini magĩcookanĩrĩria andũ arĩa marũaga na hiũ cia njora 20,060 kuuma matũũra-inĩ mao, mongereirwo harĩ andũ magana mũgwanja arĩa maathuurĩtwo kuuma kũrĩ andũ arĩa maatũũraga kũu Gibea.
english: The children of Benjamin were counted on that day out of the cities twenty-six thousand men who drew the sword, in addition to the inhabitants of Gibeah, who were counted seven hundred chosen men.

kikuyu: Mũtikanarute wĩra o na ũrĩkũ. Ũyũ ũgũtuĩka watho mwandĩke wa gũtũũra nginya harĩ njiarwa iria igooka, o kũrĩa guothe mũgaatũũra.
english: “Therefore you shall keep my commandments, and do them. I am Yahweh.

kikuyu: “Ũyũ nĩguo bũrũri ũrĩa ũtigarĩte: nĩ ngʼongo ciothe cia Afilisti na cia Ageshuru:
english: “This is the land that still remains: all the regions of the Philistines, and all the Geshurites;

kikuyu: Gũtirĩ o na ũmwe ũngĩcooka kũhe Ngai ũgooci tiga o mũgeni ũyũ?”
english: 1 He also spoke a parable to them that they must always pray and not give up,

kikuyu: Tigai gũtuanagĩra ciira na ũrĩa mũndũ atariĩ, tuanagĩrai ciira na kĩhooto.” Jesũ nĩwe Kristũ?
english: I said therefore to you that you will die in your sins; for unless you believe that I am‡ he, you will die in your sins.”

kikuyu: Mĩario ĩyo yanyu mĩingĩ ya mũhũhũtĩko-rĩ, ndĩrĩĩthira? Nĩ kĩĩ kĩramũthĩĩnia, gĩgatũma mũtinde mũgĩkararania?
english: Shall vain words have an end? Or what provokes you that you answer?

kikuyu: Wee Jehova, tũhonokie; Wee Jehova, tũma tũgaacĩre.
english: Save us now, we beg you, Yahweh! Yahweh, we beg you, send prosperity now.

kikuyu: “O ta ũrĩa wĩtanaga mũthenya wa gĩathĩ-rĩ, noguo ũnjĩtĩire maũndũ ma kũnguoyohia, makandigiicĩria mĩena yothe o taarĩ mũthenya wa gĩathĩ. Mũthenya wa marakara ma Jehova-rĩ,
english: “You have called, as in the day of a solemn assembly, my terrors on every side. There was no one that escaped or remained in the day of Yahweh’s anger. My enemy has consumed those whom I have cared for and brought up.

kikuyu: Hau gĩthaku-inĩ gĩa itoonyero nĩ haarĩ metha igĩrĩ o mwena, na igũrũ rĩacio nĩho haathĩnjagĩrwo nyamũ cia magongona ma njino, na magongona ma mehia, o na magongona ma mahĩtia.
english: In the porch of the gate were two tables on this side and two tables on that side, on which to kill the burnt offering, the sin offering, and the trespass offering.

kikuyu: Ndaamũrutire bũrũri wa Misiri, ngĩmũkũũra kuuma bũrũri wa ũkombo. Ngĩtũma Musa amũtongorie, marĩ na Harũni na Miriamu.
english: For I brought you up out of the land of Egypt, and redeemed you out of the house of bondage. I sent before you Moses, Aaron, and Miriam.

kikuyu: Mũndũ mũbaarĩrĩri onaga ũgwati akehitha, no arĩa matarĩ ũũgĩ mathiiaga o na mbere nao magatoonya thĩĩna-inĩ.
english: A prudent man sees danger and hides himself; but the simple pass on, and suffer for it.

kikuyu: Mahinda maingĩ nĩndathiiaga kuuma thunagogi-inĩ ĩmwe nginya ĩrĩa ĩngĩ nĩgeetha ndĩmaneane maherithio, na ngageria kũmahatĩrĩria marume Ngai. Na tondũ wa ũrĩa ndaamarakarĩire mũno nĩndathiiaga kũmanyariira o na matũũra-inĩ marĩa manene ma kũngĩ.
english: For if I have done wrong and have committed anything worthy of death, I don’t refuse to die; but if none of those things is true that they accuse me of, no one can give me up to them. I appeal to Caesar!”

kikuyu: (nĩ ũndũ maciaro ma ũtheri monekaga thĩinĩ wa ũhoro wothe wa gwĩkana wega, na wa ũthingu, o na ũhoro wa ma),
english: for the fruit of the Spirit is in all goodness and righteousness and truth,

kikuyu: Kĩrathimo kĩa Jehova nĩkĩo kĩrehaga ũtonga, na ndarĩ kĩeha onganagĩrĩria nakĩo.
english: Yahweh’s blessing brings wealth, and he adds no trouble to it.

kikuyu: Andũ aya magarũraga ũtukũ makaũtua mũthenya; nduma yamakinyĩrĩra moigaga atĩrĩ, ‘Ũtheri ũrĩ o hakuhĩ.’
english: They change the night into day, saying ‘The light is near’ in the presence of darkness.

kikuyu: Mũhũũrage na rũthanju nĩguo ũhonokie muoyo wake kuuma kũrĩ gĩkuũ.
english: Punish him with the rod, and save his soul from Sheol.†

kikuyu: “Andũ arĩa athingu nĩmeyonagĩra mwanangĩko wa acio aaganu, magakena; arĩa matarĩ na ũũru mekĩte mamanyũrũragia makiugaga atĩrĩ:
english: You say, ‘God lays up his iniquity for his children.’ Let him recompense it to himself, that he may know it.

kikuyu: Ũmwe wao, warĩ njorua ya watho, akĩmũgeria na kũmũũria kĩũria gĩkĩ: 36“Mũrutani, nĩ rĩathani rĩrĩkũ inene thĩinĩ wa Watho?”
english: One of them, a lawyer, asked him a question, testing him.

kikuyu: “ ‘Mwathani Jehova ekuuga ũũ: Mũthenya ũrĩa ngaamũtheria mũthirwo nĩ mehia manyu mothe-rĩ, nĩngatũma matũũra manyu macooke gũtũũrwo, na kũrĩa kwanangĩku nĩgũgacookererio.
english: “ ‘The Lord Yahweh says: “In the day that I cleanse you from all your iniquities, I will cause the cities to be inhabited and the waste places will be built.

kikuyu: Okire gwake mwene, no andũ ake mwene matiigana kũmwĩtĩkĩra. No andũ arĩa othe maamwĩtĩkĩrire, o acio metĩkirie rĩĩtwa rĩake, nĩamahotithirie gũtuĩka ciana cia Ngai
english: He came to his own, and those who were his own didn’t receive him.

kikuyu: no nĩgũtukana maatukanire na ndũrĩrĩ, na makĩrũmĩrĩra mĩtugo yao.
english: but mixed themselves with the nations, and learned their works.

kikuyu: “No rĩrĩ, inyuĩ arĩa mũtiganĩirie Jehova, na mũkariganĩrwo nĩ kĩrĩma gĩakwa kĩrĩa kĩamũre, inyuĩ arĩa mwaragĩra metha ngai ya maheeni ĩrĩa ĩtagwo Mũreehi-mũnyaka, na mũkaiyũria mbakũri cia ndibei ya mũtukanio mũgaitĩra ngai ĩrĩa ĩtagwo Mũreehi-mũtino nĩguo mũmĩhoorerie-rĩ,
english: that you may nurse and be satisfied at the comforting breasts; that you may drink deeply, and be delighted with the abundance of her glory.”

kikuyu: Ũgĩũka-rĩ, ndehera kabuti karĩa ndatigire gwa Karipo kũrĩa Teroa, na ũndehere mabuku makwa ma gĩkũnjo, na makĩria njũa iria cia kwandĩkwo.
english: I command you before God who gives life to all things, and before Christ Jesus who before Pontius Pilate testified the good confession,

kikuyu: Nĩatambũrũkirie itu rĩmahumbagĩre, o na mwaki wa kũmamũrĩkagĩra ũtukũ.
english: He spread a cloud for a covering, fire to give light in the night.

kikuyu: “Tũma arũme amwe mathiĩ magathigaane bũrũri wa Kaanani, ũrĩa ngũhe andũ a Isiraeli. Tũma mũtongoria ũmwe wao, kuuma o mũhĩrĩga o mũhĩrĩga wa maithe mao.” Nake Musa agĩathĩkĩra watho wa Jehova, na agĩtũma andũ acio kuuma Werũ wa Parani. Andũ acio othe maarĩ atongoria a andũ a Isiraeli.
english: “Send men, that they may spy out the land of Canaan, which I give to the children of Israel. Of every tribe of their fathers, you shall send a man, every one a prince among them.”

kikuyu: eheria andũ arĩa aaganu harĩ mũthamaki, na gĩtĩ gĩake kĩa ũnene nĩgĩkũrũmio nĩ ũthingu.
english: Take away the wicked from the king’s presence, and his throne will be established in righteousness.

kikuyu: Acio oiki nĩo marĩtoonyaga handũ-hakwa- harĩa-haamũre; acio oiki nĩo marĩĩkuhagĩrĩria metha yakwa makandungatĩra na makaruta wĩra wakwa.
english: “All the people of the land shall give to this offering for the prince in Israel.

kikuyu: Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ, “O ta ũrĩa igũrũ rĩu rĩerũ na thĩ njerũ iria ngũthondeka igatũũra mbere yakwa-rĩ, ũguo noguo rĩĩtwa rĩaku na njiaro ciaku irĩtũũraga.
english: “For as the new heavens and the new earth, which I will make, shall remain before me,” says Yahweh, “so your offspring and your name shall remain.

kikuyu: “ ‘No rĩrĩ, angĩkorwo iruta rĩake riumanĩte na ũndũ wa mwĩhĩtwa ehĩtĩte, kana nĩ rĩa kwĩyendera- rĩ, iruta rĩu rĩkaarĩĩo mũthenya o ro ũcio akaarĩruta, no kĩrĩa gĩothe gĩgaatigara no kĩrĩĩo mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ.
english: He took all the fat that was on the innards, and the cover of the liver, and the two kidneys, and their fat; and Moses burned it on the altar.

kikuyu: Ũhonokio waku nĩguo ndĩĩriragĩria, Wee Jehova, naguo watho waku nĩguo ngenagĩra.
english: I have longed for your salvation, Yahweh. Your law is my delight.

kikuyu: “Niĩ nĩ niĩ thuurĩte Alawii kuuma kũrĩ andũ a Isiraeli ithenya rĩa marigithathi ma arũme arĩa marigithathĩtwo nĩ andũ-a-nja othe a Isiraeli. Alawii nĩ akwa,
english: “Behold,† I have taken the Levites from among the children of Israel instead of all the firstborn who open the womb among the children of Israel; and the Levites shall be mine,

kikuyu: Kuona atĩ andũ akwa nĩmahehenjetwo-rĩ, o na niĩ ndĩmũhehenje; nĩndĩracaaya na nĩnyiitĩtwo nĩ kĩmako kĩnene.
english: For the hurt of the daughter of my people, I am hurt. I mourn. Dismay has taken hold of me.

kikuyu: Kũrathimwo-rĩ, nĩ andũ arĩa mĩthiĩre yao ĩtarĩ ũcuuke, o arĩa mathiiaga kũringana na watho wa Jehova.
english: Blessed are those whose ways are blameless, who walk according to Yahweh’s law.

kikuyu: nĩgũkorwo nĩ kwandĩkĩtwo atĩrĩ: “Kena wee mũndũ-wa-nja thata, wee ũtaciaraga ciana, tumũra kanua na wanĩrĩre, wee ũtarĩ waigua ruo rwa kũgĩa mwana; tondũ ciana cia mũndũ-wa-nja ũrĩa ũtiganĩirio nĩ nyingĩ gũkĩra cia ũrĩa ũrĩ na mũthuuri.” Na rĩrĩ, inyuĩ ariũ na aarĩ a Ithe witũ, mũrĩ ciana cia kĩĩranĩro, o ta ũrĩa Isaaka aarĩ.
english: For it is written, “Rejoice, you barren who don’t bear. Break out and shout, you who don’t travail. For the desolate women have more children than her who has a husband.”*

kikuyu: Mũndũ wa rũmena aaragia ũhinga na mĩromo yake, no thĩinĩ wa ngoro yake aiyũrĩtwo no maheeni.
english: A malicious man disguises himself with his lips, but he harbors evil in his heart.

kikuyu: “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio, inyuĩ andũ a nyũmba ya Isiraeli, nĩngũmũtuĩra ciira, o mũndũ o mũndũ kũringana na mĩthiĩre yake, ũguo nĩguo Mwathani Jehova ekuuga. Mwĩrirei! Tiganai na mahĩtia manyu mothe; namo mehia manyu matigatũma mwanangwo.
english: “Therefore I will judge you, house of Israel, everyone according to his ways,” says the Lord Yahweh. “Return, and turn yourselves from all your transgressions, so iniquity will not be your ruin.

kikuyu: Ndũrĩrĩ ciothe nĩigacookanĩrĩrio mbere yake, nake nĩakamũrania andũ kuuma kũrĩ arĩa angĩ, o ta ũrĩa mũrĩithi aamũranagia ngʼondu na mbũri.
english: Before him all the nations will be gathered, and he will separate them one from another, as a shepherd separates the sheep from the goats.

kikuyu: Harĩ yo njũgũma no ta gacunjĩ ka rũnyeki rũmũ; ĩthekagĩrĩra kũbĩrĩrĩka gwa itimũ.
english: Clubs are counted as stubble. He laughs at the rushing of the javelin.

kikuyu: ngakenagĩra thĩ yake yothe, na ngakenagio nĩ andũ othe a thĩ.
english: rejoicing in his whole world. My delight was with the sons of men.

kikuyu: O na anene amwe a bũrũri wa Asia arĩa maarĩ arata a Paũlũ makĩmũtũmanĩra, makĩmũthaitha ndakagerie gũtoonya nyũmba ĩyo yagomanagwo nĩ ũndũ wa kuona mĩago.
english: Certain also of the Asiarchs, being his friends, sent to him and begged him not to venture into the theater.

kikuyu: Hinya wakwa ũniarĩte ta rũgĩo, naruo rũrĩmĩ rwakwa rũkanyiitana na karakara nĩkũngʼara; ũngometie rũkũngũ-inĩ rwa gĩkuũ.
english: My strength is dried up like a potsherd. My tongue sticks to the roof of my mouth. You have brought me into the dust of death.

kikuyu: nao magĩũkĩrĩra Ngai o na Musa na mĩario makiuga atĩrĩ, “Mwatũrutire bũrũri wa Misiri tũũke tũkuĩre gũkũ werũ-inĩ nĩkĩ? Gũkũ gũtirĩ irio! Na gũtirĩ maaĩ! O na nĩtũthũire irio ici itarĩ kĩene!” Nake Jehova akĩmatũmĩra nyoka ciarĩ na thumu; ikĩrũma andũ a Isiraeli, na aingĩ ao magĩkua.
english: The people spoke against God and against Moses: “Why have you brought us up out of Egypt to die in the wilderness? For there is no bread, there is no water, and our soul loathes this disgusting food!”

kikuyu: Icookio rĩa wĩhokeku nĩ ta kĩmumunyano kĩa mĩromo.
english: An honest answer is like a kiss on the lips.

kikuyu: morũũraga kuuma rũrĩrĩ rũmwe nginya rũrĩa rũngĩ, na kuuma ũthamaki-inĩ ũmwe nginya ũrĩa ũngĩ.
english: They went about from nation to nation, from one kingdom to another people.

kikuyu: “Ĩtai aikia a mĩguĩ mokĩrĩre Babuloni, o arĩa othe mageetaga ũta. Ambaai hema mũgũthiũrũrũkĩirie; * 50:21 Merathaimu rĩgĩtaũrwo nĩ kuuga “kũremera Jehova maita meerĩ.”
english: “Call together the archers against Babylon, all those who bend the bow.

kikuyu: Ihinda rĩu nĩrĩkinyu, mũthenya ũcio nĩũkinyĩte. Mũgũri nĩatige gũkena kana mwendia aigue kĩeha, nĩgũkorwo mangʼũrĩ nĩmakinyĩrĩire kĩrĩndĩ kĩu gĩothe.
english: Then he said to me, “Son of man, have you seen what the elders of the house of Israel do in the dark, every man in his rooms of imagery? For they say, ‘Yahweh doesn’t see us. Yahweh has forsaken the land.’ ”

kikuyu: Mũgongo wayo ũrĩ na ngo ciĩiganĩrĩire mĩhari, ikomanĩire ikanyiitana;
english: Strong scales are his pride, shut up together with a close seal.

kikuyu: Wee Mwathani-rĩ, nĩwe wanjiirĩrĩire; nawe ũgĩgĩkũũra muoyo wakwa.
english: Lord, you have pleaded the causes of my soul. You have redeemed my life.

kikuyu: tondũ Johana nĩamwĩrĩte atĩrĩ: “Watho ndũgwĩtĩkĩrĩtie ũmũhikie.”
english: For God commanded, ‘Honor your father and your mother,’* and, ‘He who speaks evil of father or mother, let him be put to death.’*

kikuyu: Nĩngagũũkĩrĩra na guoko gwakwa; ngagũtheria gĩko gĩaku gĩthire biũ, na maũndũ maku mothe marĩa matarĩ matheru ndĩmatherie.
english: I will turn my hand on you, thoroughly purge away your dross, and will take away all your tin.‡

kikuyu: Nĩngamũrũmbũiya ngĩmũhĩtũkĩria rungu rwa rũthanju rwakwa, na nĩngamũrehe ndĩmuohanie na kĩrĩkanĩro gĩakwa.
english: “I will cause you to pass under the rod, and I will bring you into the bond of the covenant.

kikuyu: (Eekire ũguo nĩgeetha arute njiaro cia andũ a Isiraeli ũhoro wa mbaara tondũ njiaro icio itiamenyete ũhoro wa kũrũa mbaara).
english: only that the generations of the children of Israel might know, to teach them war, at least those who knew nothing of it before:

kikuyu: No rĩrĩ, maitho makwa nĩwe macũthĩrĩirie, Wee Mwathani Jehova; nĩ harĩwe njũragĩra; nĩ ũndũ ũcio ndũkareke ngue.
english: Cause me to hear your loving kindness in the morning, for I trust in you. Cause me to know the way in which I should walk, for I lift up my soul to you.

kikuyu: Akĩrai andũ-a-nja anyu na ciana matũũra manene na ciugũ cia ndũũru cianyu, no hingiai ũguo mweranĩra.” * 31:52 nĩ ta kilo
english: You shall wash your clothes on the seventh day, and you shall be clean. Afterward you shall come into the camp.”

kikuyu: Kĩrĩma-inĩ gĩkĩ nĩkĩo akaanangĩra taama ũrĩa wohanĩtie andũ othe, na cuka ũrĩa ũhumbĩrĩte ndũrĩrĩ ciothe;
english: The new wine mourns. The vine languishes. All the merry-hearted sigh.

kikuyu: Ndũĩrĩra na ũkĩngũũre; tũũria muoyo wakwa kũringana na kĩĩranĩro gĩaku.
english: Plead my cause, and redeem me! Revive me according to your promise.

kikuyu: “ ‘Mũndũ-wa-nja ũrĩa akaahikia no nginya agaakorwo arĩ mũirĩtu gathirange.
english: “ ‘He shall take a wife in her virginity.

kikuyu: Kuuma rĩu andũ a Isiraeli matigakuhagĩrĩrie Hema-ya-Gũtũnganwo, kana macookererwo nĩ mehia mao, nao makue.
english: Henceforth the children of Israel shall not come near the Tent of Meeting, lest they bear sin, and die.

kikuyu: O na gũtuĩka nĩũtũmĩte nyone mathĩĩna maingĩ na marũrũ-rĩ, nĩũkariũkia muoyo wakwa rĩngĩ; nĩũkandiũkia rĩngĩ kuuma thĩ kũrĩa kũriku.
english: This ends the prayers by David, the son of Jesse. BOOK

kikuyu: “Waganu wao wothe nĩũgĩkinye mbere yaku, nawe ũmeke o ta ũrĩa ũnjĩkĩte nĩ ũndũ wa mehia makwa mothe. Mĩcaayo yakwa nĩ mĩingĩ, nayo ngoro yakwa nĩĩringĩkĩte.”
english: “Let all their wickedness come before you. Do to them as you have done to me for all my transgressions. For my sighs are many, and my heart is faint.

kikuyu: O na akorwo marĩ na anene kũu Zoani, na mabarũthi mao nĩmakinyĩte Hanesi-rĩ,
english: For when one says, “I follow Paul,” and another, “I follow Apollos,” aren’t you fleshly?

kikuyu: Nĩgũkorwo andũ ta acio ti Mwathani witũ Kristũ matungataga, no nĩ nda ciao ene matungataga. Nĩmaheenagia ngoro cia andũ arĩa matooĩ ũũru na ũndũ wa mĩario yao mĩnyoroku na ndeto ciao cia kwĩyendithĩrĩria.
english: For I will not dare to speak of any things except those which Christ worked through me for the obedience of the Gentiles, by word and deed,

kikuyu: na magĩtwara andũ arĩa matahĩtwo na indo icio maatunyanĩte, na iria maatahĩte kũrĩ Musa na kũrĩ Eleazaru ũrĩa mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai na kũrĩ kĩũngano kĩa andũ a Isiraeli kũu kambĩ yarĩ werũ-inĩ wa Moabi, hũgũrũrũ-inĩ cia Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani mũrĩmo wa Jeriko.
english: Yahweh said to Moses, “Go up into this mountain of Abarim, and see the land which I have given to the children of Israel.

kikuyu: Mũndũ ũcio nĩarũmagĩrĩra watho wakwa wa kũrũmĩrĩrwo, na akahingia watho wakwa na wĩhokeku. Mũndũ ũcio nĩ mũthingu; ti-itherũ nĩagatũũra muoyo, ũguo nĩguo Mwathani Jehova ekuuga.
english: They put him in a cage with hooks, and brought him to the king of Babylon. They brought him into strongholds, so that his voice should no more be heard on the mountains of Israel.

kikuyu: “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio, mũthamaki angĩona arĩ wega, nĩarute watho wa ũthamaki na etĩkĩre wandĩkwo mawatho-inĩ ma Perisia na Media, marĩa matagarũragwo, atĩ Vashiti ndarĩ hĩndĩ ĩngĩ agooka mbere ya Mũthamaki Ahasuerusu. Naho handũ ha Vashiti-rĩ, mũthamaki acarie mũndũ-wa-nja ũngĩ mwega kũmũkĩra. Rĩrĩa watho ũcio wa mũthamaki ũrĩanĩrĩrwo kũndũ guothe kũrĩa mũthamaki aathanaga- rĩ, andũ-a-nja othe nĩmarĩtĩĩaga athuuri ao, kuuma ũrĩa mũnini nginya ũrĩa mũnene.”
english: “If it pleases the king, let a royal commandment go from him, and let it be written among the laws of the Persians and the Medes, so that it cannot be altered, that Vashti may never again come before King Ahasuerus; and let the king give her royal estate to another who is better than she.

kikuyu: Mũnene ũcio wa thigari agĩũka akĩmũnyiita na agĩathana ohwo na mĩnyororo ĩĩrĩ. Agĩcooka akĩũria aarĩ ũ na nĩ atĩa ekĩte.
english: Then the commanding officer came near, arrested him, commanded him to be bound with two chains, and inquired who he was and what he had done.

kikuyu: “Ũrĩa wothe mekaga, mekaga nĩguo monwo nĩ andũ: Maaraaramagia tũthandũkũ tũrĩa meyohaga thiithi tũrĩ na maandĩko thĩinĩ, na makaraihia ciohe cia ndigi cia nguo ciao,
english: But they do all their works to be seen by men. They make their phylacteries† broad and enlarge the fringes‡ of their garments,

kikuyu: “ ‘Ndũkanakome na tataguo kana mwarĩ wa nyina na thoguo, nĩ ũndũ gwĩka ũguo nĩ gũconorithia mũndũ ũrĩa mũrĩ rũrĩra; inyuĩ eerĩ nĩmũgacookererwo nĩ ũũru ũcio mwĩkĩte.
english: However, God’s firm foundation stands, having this seal: “The Lord knows those who are his,”* and, “Let every one who names the name of the Lord‡ depart from unrighteousness.”

kikuyu: Nĩũgatahĩka kĩrĩa kĩnini ũgaakorwo ũrĩĩte, nacio ngaatho ciaku nĩikoorĩra thĩ.
english: One who plots to do evil will be called a schemer.

kikuyu: mĩgambo ya gĩkeno na ya gũcanjamũka, na mĩgambo ya mũhiki na mũhikania, o na mĩgambo ya andũ arĩa mararehe indo cia maruta ma gũcookia ngaatho nyũmba-inĩ ya Jehova, makiugaga atĩrĩ, “ ‘ “Cookeriai Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe ngaatho, nĩ ũndũ Jehova nĩ mwega; wendo wake ũtũũraga tene na tene.” Nĩgũkorwo nĩngacookeria bũrũri ũyũ ũgaacĩru waguo, o ta ũrĩa warĩ kuo mbere,’ nĩguo Jehova ekuuga.
english: the voice of joy and the voice of gladness, the voice of the bridegroom and the voice of the bride, the voice of those who say, ‘Give thanks to Yahweh of Armies, for Yahweh is good, for his loving kindness endures forever;’ who bring thanksgiving into Yahweh’s house. For I will cause the captivity of the land to be reversed as at the first,” says Yahweh.

kikuyu: Jehova Mwene-Hinya-Wothe ekuuga atĩrĩ: “Rũthingo rwa Babuloni rũrĩa rwariĩ nĩrũkangʼaũranio biũ, nacio ihingo ciakuo iria ndaaya na igũrũ icinwo na mwaki; andũ menogagia tũhũ, naguo wĩra wa ndũrĩrĩ no ngũ cia gũcinwo na mwaki.”
english: Yahweh of Armies says: “The wide walls of Babylon will be utterly overthrown. Her high gates will be burned with fire. The peoples will labor for vanity, and the nations for the fire; and they will be weary.”

kikuyu: Matũũra macio na tũtũũra twamo nĩmo maarĩ igai rĩa mũhĩrĩga wa Nafitali, kũringana na ũrĩa mbarĩ ciao ciatariĩ. Igai rĩa Dani
english: This is the inheritance of the tribe of the children of Naphtali according to their families, the cities with their villages.

kikuyu: Nĩngamũruta ndũrĩrĩ- inĩ na guoko kũrĩ hinya, na guoko gũtambũrũkĩtio, o na mangʼũrĩ maitanĩrĩirio, ndĩmũcookererie kuuma mabũrũri-inĩ marĩa mwahurunjirwo.
english: I will bring you out from the peoples, and will gather you out of the countries in which you are scattered with a mighty hand, with an outstretched arm, and with wrath poured out.

kikuyu: na Hazoru-Shuali, na Birishiba, na Biziothia,
english: Hazar Shual, Beersheba, Biziothiah,

kikuyu: Sisera agĩcookanĩrĩria ngaari ciake cia ita cia igera magana kenda, hamwe na andũ othe arĩa maarĩ hamwe nake, kuuma Haroshethu-Hagoyimu nginya Rũũĩ rwa Kishoni.
english: Sisera gathered together all his chariots, even nine hundred chariots of iron, and all the people who were with him, from Harosheth of the Gentiles, to the river Kishon.

kikuyu: ningĩ Firaũni mũthamaki wa Misiri, na arĩa mamũtungataga, na anene ake na andũ ake othe,
english: Pharaoh king of Egypt, with his servants, his princes, and all his people;

kikuyu: Jehova nĩerire Mwathani wakwa atĩrĩ: “Ikara guoko-inĩ gwakwa kwa ũrĩo, nginya rĩrĩa ngaatũma thũ ciaku ituĩke gaturwa ka makinya maku.”*
english: Yahweh says to my Lord, “Sit at my right hand, until I make your enemies your footstool for your feet.”

kikuyu: Nduta menye ũrĩa itarahota kuona; ingĩkorwo nĩnjĩkĩte ũũru-rĩ, ndigacooka gwĩka ũguo rĩngĩ.’
english: Teach me that which I don’t see. If I have done iniquity, I will do it no more’?

kikuyu: Betha yanyu ĩtuĩkĩte gĩko, ndibei yanyu ĩrĩa njega mũno ĩgatukanio na maaĩ.
english: Your silver has become dross, your wine mixed with water.

kikuyu: Ũyũ nĩguo ũhoro ũrĩa Jehova aaririe ũkoniĩ Isiraeli na Juda:
english: These are the words that Yahweh spoke concerning Israel and concerning Judah.

kikuyu: areehagĩra kĩĩhitho kĩrũmu mwanangĩko o rĩmwe ta rũheni, narĩo itũũra inene rĩrĩa rĩirigĩre akarĩanangithia),
english: It will happen that if ten men remain in one house, they will die.

kikuyu: ĩtegwĩciiria atĩ no makinywo na magũrũ makue, kana marangwo nĩ nyamũ ya gĩthaka.
english: and forgets that the foot may crush them, or that the wild animal may trample them.

kikuyu: Nowe Loti akĩmaringĩrĩria na hinya mũno mathiĩ gwake mũciĩ, nginya magĩtĩkĩra. Magĩthiĩ nake, magĩtoonya nyũmba gwake. Nake akĩmathondekera irio, akĩruga mĩgate ĩtaarĩ ndawa ya kũimbia, nao makĩrĩa.
english: He urged them greatly, and they came in with him, and entered into his house. He made them a feast, and baked unleavened bread, and they ate.

kikuyu: Mũgaatuĩka ta mũgandi ũrahooha mathangũ, mũtuĩke ta mũgũnda ũtarĩ maaĩ.
english: For you shall be as an oak whose leaf fades, and as a garden that has no water.

kikuyu: Ũrĩa wothe ũkaamũkĩra mũnabii tondũ nĩ mũnabii, nĩakamũkĩra kĩheo kĩrĩa kĩheagwo mũnabii, nake ũrĩa wothe ũkaamũkĩra mũndũ mũthingu tondũ nĩ mũthingu-rĩ, nĩakamũkĩra kĩheo kĩrĩa kĩheagwo mũndũ mũthingu. Nake ũrĩa wothe ũheaga ũmwe wa aya anini o na gĩkombe kĩa maaĩ mahehu tondũ nĩ mũrutwo wakwa-rĩ, ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma, ndakaaga kũheo kĩheo gĩake.”
english: He who receives a prophet in the name of a prophet will receive a prophet’s reward. He who receives a righteous man in the name of a righteous man will receive a righteous man’s reward.

kikuyu: Ngometio thĩ rũkũngũ-inĩ; tũũria muoyo wakwa kũringana na kiugo gĩaku.
english: My soul is laid low in the dust. Revive me according to your word!

kikuyu: Riũa na mweri nĩikaagĩa nduma, nacio njata itigacooka kwara rĩngĩ.
english: The sun and the moon are darkened, and the stars withdraw their shining.

kikuyu: Ũndũ ũcio ũgĩtũma atuuo mũthingu. Na rĩrĩ, ciugo icio ciandĩkĩtwo atĩrĩ “Nĩatuirwo mũthingu” itiandĩkirwo nĩ ũndũ wake wiki,
english: Therefore it also was “credited to him for righteousness.”*

kikuyu: Wangaĩire ũrĩ na mĩnyamaro na niĩ ngĩkũhatũra, ngĩgwĩtĩka ndĩ thĩinĩ wa mũrurumo wa ngwa; † 80:11 Ũthamaki wa Daudi na Solomoni woimĩte Iria rĩrĩa Inene nginya Rũũĩ rwa Farati.
english: You called in trouble, and I delivered you. I answered you in the secret place of thunder. I tested you at the waters of Meribah.” Selah. 8“Hear, my people, and I will testify to you, Israel, if you would listen to me!

kikuyu: Mũtikareke mũndũ o na ũ amũheenie na ciugo cia tũhũ, nĩgũkorwo maũndũ ta macio nĩmo matũmaga mangʼũrĩ ma Ngai makinyĩre andũ arĩa matamwathĩkagĩra. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ, mũtikagĩe ngwatanĩro nao.
english: Let no one deceive you with empty words, for because of these things the wrath of God comes on the children of disobedience.

kikuyu: “Rĩu-rĩ, ariũ aku eerĩ arĩa maaciarĩirwo gũkũ Misiri itanooka kũrĩ we-rĩ, megũtuuo ta marĩ akwa; Efiraimu na Manase meegũtuĩka akwa, o ta ũrĩa Rubeni na Simeoni marĩ akwa.
english: Now your two sons, who were born to you in the land of Egypt before I came to you into Egypt, are mine; Ephraim and Manasseh, even as Reuben and Simeon, will be mine.

kikuyu: Ti atĩ nĩnjĩtĩkagĩra ũira wa mũndũ; no nĩndĩũgwetaga nĩgeetha mũhonokio.
english: But the testimony which I receive is not from man. However, I say these things that you may be saved.

kikuyu: o acio mathugundaga maũndũ mooru ngoro-inĩ ciao, na magathugunda mbaara o mũthenya.
english: Let my prayer be set before you like incense; the lifting up of my hands like the evening sacrifice.

kikuyu: Ndahatĩkĩtwo mũno nĩ thũ hakuhĩ ngwe, no Jehova akĩndeithia.
english: For if we are beside ourselves, it is for God. Or if we are of sober mind, it is for you.

kikuyu: na Dana, na Kiriathu-Sana (na no kuo Debiri),
english: Dannah, Kiriath Sannah (which is Debir),

kikuyu: Mũndũ ũcio nĩaigĩrĩre guoko gwake igũrũ rĩa mũtwe wa nyamũ ĩyo ya iruta rĩake, na acooke amĩthĩnjĩre hau mũromo-inĩ wa Hema-ya-Gũtũnganwo. Nao ariũ a Harũni, athĩnjĩri-Ngai, nĩmakaminjaminjĩria kĩgongona thakame yayo mĩena yothe.
english: He shall lay his hand on the head of his offering, and kill it at the door of the Tent of Meeting. Aaron’s sons, the priests, shall sprinkle the blood around on the altar.

kikuyu: Mũndũ mũrũme o wothe wa nyũmba ya mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai no arĩe nyama cia iruta rĩu, na no nginya rĩrĩĩrwo handũ hatheru; nĩ iruta itheru mũno makĩria.
english: Every male among the priests may eat of it. It shall be eaten in a holy place. It is most holy.

kikuyu: Nĩngatharia nyũmba ya hĩndĩ ya gathano, o hamwe na nyũmba ya hĩndĩ ya riũa; nyũmba iria ngʼemie na mĩguongo nĩikaanangwo, nacio nyũmba iria nene mũno nĩikamomorwo,” * 3:14 Mehia ma Isiraeli maagĩire mĩri marĩ Betheli rĩrĩa Mũthamaki Jeroboamu aathondekire ngai ya gacaũ, na akĩmĩakĩra kĩgongona kuo.
english: I will strike the winter house with the summer house; and the houses of ivory will perish, and the great houses will have an end,” says Yahweh.

kikuyu: na andũ othe maarĩkia kũringa o ũguo, ithandũkũ rĩa Jehova o narĩo na athĩnjĩri-Ngai makĩringa makĩonagwo nĩ andũ othe.
english: As soon as we had heard it, our hearts melted, and there wasn’t any more spirit in any man, because of you: for Yahweh your God, he is God in heaven above, and on earth beneath.

kikuyu: Nĩgũkorwo rĩrĩa wĩhia wonire kamweke karĩa kaaheanĩtwo nĩ rĩathani rĩu-rĩ, nĩ kũũheenia waheenirie, na ũkĩnjũraga narĩo. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ, watho nĩ mũtheru, o na rĩathani no rĩtheru, na nĩ rĩa kĩhooto na nĩ rĩega.
english: Not only so, but we also rejoice in God through our Lord Jesus Christ, through whom we have now received the reconciliation.

kikuyu: Mũthenya ũcio-rĩ, nĩguo Ngai aatooririe Jabini, mũthamaki wa andũ a Kaanani, mbere ya andũ a Isiraeli.
english: So God subdued Jabin the king of Canaan before the children of Israel on that day.

kikuyu: Matukũ makwa nĩ mathiru, mĩbango yakwa nĩmĩharaganie, o na merirĩria ma ngoro yakwa.
english: My days are past. My plans are broken off, as are the thoughts of my heart.

kikuyu: Warĩ ũndũ mwega niĩ nyone thĩĩna, nĩgeetha ndĩĩrute kĩrĩra kĩa watho waku.
english: It is good for me that I have been afflicted, that I may learn your statutes.

kikuyu: Ta thikĩrĩriai mataaro makwa nĩguo mũhĩge; mũtikamarege.
english: Hear instruction, and be wise. Don’t refuse it.

kikuyu: “Ũyũ nĩguo mũthiĩre wa mũndũ-wa-nja mũtharia: Arĩĩaga na akehuura mĩromo, akoiga atĩrĩ, ‘Ndirĩ ũndũ mũũru njĩkĩte.’
english: She opens her arms to the poor; yes, she extends her hands to the needy.

kikuyu: “Na rĩu ndagũthaitha ũreke niĩ ndungata yaku ndigwo gũkũ nduĩke ngombo ya mwathi wakwa handũ ha kamwana gaka, na wĩtĩkĩrie kamwana gaka kainũke na ariũ a ithe.
english: Now therefore, please let your servant stay instead of the boy, my lord’s slave; and let the boy go up with his brothers.

kikuyu: Akĩmĩkuua, agĩcooka itũũra-inĩ, nake nyaciarawe akĩona cairi ĩrĩa yothe aahaarĩte. Ruthu agĩcooka akĩmũrutĩra kĩrĩa aatigĩtie aahũũna, akĩmũnengera.
english: When Naomi saw that she was determined to go with her, she stopped urging her.
